full_text:
Wang Hong (Zhengzong) 王宏 (正宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Hong (王宏), styledZhengzong (正宗), was born in Shanyang. Director of Retainers. Wang Hong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
